title: Green Giants: 7 ESG Stocks Leading the Way in Sustainable Investing
text: The surge in interest in ESG stocks among millennials and Generation Z is effectively reshaping the investment landscape. Firms ignoring ESG principles risk major backlash as ethical considerations become imperative in business.

title: December Looks Great For Investors Who Own 9 Stocks
text: Investors can only hope stocks do as well in December as they did in November. There are definitely some S&P 500 stocks that glisten.
